manifest.description:
Kitsu comic and novel metadata provider for Kumiho
Logging in improves search accuracy.
config.access_token.label: Access Token
config.access_token.description: Optional token used for user-scoped advanced search.
config.refresh_token.label: Refresh Token
config.refresh_token.description: Optional refresh token used to renew the access token.
auth.login.title: Kitsu Login
auth.login.description:
Kitsu homepage: https://kitsu.app
Log in with a Kitsu account to issue and store tokens.
The password is not stored.
auth.login.required: Enter your Kitsu email (or slug) and password first.
auth.login.success_reactivate: Kitsu tokens saved. Activate the plugin again to apply them.
auth.login.error: Failed to log in to Kitsu.
auth.login.delete_reactivate: Stored Kitsu tokens removed. Activate the plugin again to use the default search.
auth.login.delete_error: Failed to remove the stored Kitsu tokens.
auth.login.field.username.label: Email or slug
auth.login.field.password.label: Password
auth.login.errors.invalid_request: Enter your Kitsu email (or slug) and password before logging in.
auth.login.errors.unauthorized: Your Kitsu email, slug, or password is incorrect.
auth.login.errors.timeout: Kitsu did not respond in time. Try again in a moment.
auth.login.errors.rate_limited: Kitsu temporarily limited login attempts. Please wait and try again.
auth.login.errors.provider_error: Kitsu could not issue a token right now. Try again later.
